tool.name: EnzyWizard Pocket
tool.description: Detect and characterize binding pockets from a cleaned protein structure

param.name: min_rad
param.label: Minimum probe radius
param.help: Minimum probe radius used in PyVOL cavity detection. Default: 1.8

param.name: max_rad
param.label: Maximum probe radius
param.help: Maximum probe radius used in PyVOL cavity detection. Default: 6.2

param.name: min_volume
param.label: Minimum pocket volume
param.help: Minimum binding pocket volume threshold. Default: 50

tool.help:
**EnzyWizard-Pocket**
Detects and characterizes binding pockets from a cleaned protein structure using PyVOL, a geometry-based pocket detection program.
**Inputs** - Cleaned protein structure in CIF or PDB format.
**Outputs** - JSON report with binding pocket information.
For more information, see the `enzywizard-pocket` documentation: https://github.com/bioinfbrad/enzywizard-pocket
